epe-foam.name: EPE Foam Packaging
epe-foam.tagline: Lightweight, flexible and shock-absorbing foam for industrial components
epe-foam.overview: EPE Foam Packaging provides lightweight and shock-absorbing protection for automotive, electronics, tooling, and industrial components. Designed for storage, handling, and transportation efficiency.

features.title: Custom Cut Foam Inserts
features.description: Precision cavities tailormade to hold components securely and prevent movement.
features.iconSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.8'><rect x='3' y='3' width='18' height='18' rx='2'/><path d='M9 17V9h6v8'/></svg>

features.title: Reusable Dunnage
features.description: Highly durable configurations for internal plant transit loops and repeated handling.

features.title: Antistatic Foam for Electronics
features.description: Safe, static-dissipative foam inserts for electronic modules and sensitive PCBs.

features.title: Automotive Component Protection
features.description: Absorbs vibration and impact during transit, keeping automotive finishes scratch-free.
features.iconSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.8'><rect x='1' y='9' width='22' height='9' rx='2'/><path d='M5 9V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h10a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v3'/><circle cx='6' cy='18' r='2'/><circle cx='18' cy='18' r='2'/></svg>

specs.Size Options: Custom sized to container / box dimensions
specs.Custom Options: Custom cavity routing, multi-layer laminations, antistatic additives

applications.title: Automotive parts protection
applications.description: Tailor-fit protection for mirrors, instrument panels, lights, and engines during factory loop transit.

applications.title: Electronics packaging
applications.description: Antistatic EPE cushion boxes and trays protect circuits, assemblies, and microchips from electrostatic shocks.
applications.iconSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.8'><rect x='2' y='2' width='20' height='20' rx='2' ry='2'/><path d='M6 6h12v12H6z'/></svg>

applications.title: Tool and kit inserts
applications.description: Shadow board organization inserts keep heavy measuring tool kits and instruments safe and neatly accessible.

applications.title: Industrial components shipping
applications.description: Protects precision-machined gears, bearings, and modules from collisions during domestic and global freight.
applications.iconSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.8'><rect x='1' y='3' width='15' height='13'/><polygon points='16 8 20 8 23 11 23 16 16 16 16 8'/><circle cx='5.5' cy='18.5' r='2.5'/><circle cx='18.5' cy='18.5' r='2.5'/></svg>

epe-foam.ctaText: Tell us your application or component requirements and our team will recommend the right EPE foam solution.
